name: case-lens-desktop
description: Desktop executable application of Case Lens legal crime identifier
author: Case Lens Team

scripts.prepackage: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue client, server; Copy-Item -Recurse ../website/client . ; Copy-Item -Recurse ../website/server ."
scripts.package: npm run build:client && npm run prepackage && electron-packager . "Case Lens" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-desktop --overwrite --ignore="client/(src|node_modules|public|tailwind.config.js|postcss.config.js)" --ignore="dist-desktop" --ignore="\.git" && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force client, server"
